problems_encountered.description: Tool requires membershipId parameter which would come from org/membership/list, which itself cannot be executed due to missing organization IDs from org/list.
Tool would perform destructive operation (revoke membership) on production data

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - missing prerequisite membership ID and would modify production data
execution_notes: This tool requires: (1) valid membershipId from org/membership/list (unavailable due to org/list ID issue), (2) confirmation flag, (3) appropriate permissions. Executing would revoke actual memberships in production environment.
